property.name: trackDeveloperName
property.label: Onboarding Track DeveloperName
property.description: DeveloperName of the OnboardingTrack__mdt to render on this record page. Leave blank to derive from the Feature__c.FeatureDefinitionTxt__c (PR 4 wires the auto-resolve).

LightningComponentBundle.description: Checkr-style onboarding stepper — renders lessons, quiz, checklist for the configured OnboardingTrack__mdt and writes state to OnboardingProgress__c.
